item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife star Lily speaks out after dramatic exit from the show following Dylan and Ally’s kiss
item.description: Lily claims some of the girls are ‘playing the game’.

item.title: Serena Williams relaunches bid to win 24th grand slam title after accepting Wimbledon singles wildcard
item.description: The 44-year-old legend is officially making a stunning comeback to singles tennis, jumping into the fire at Wimbledon.

item.title: Sonny Bill Williams rushed into second surgery after ‘worrying’ spinal cord infection
item.description: The rugby and NRL champion feared for his future when he suffered serious complications following a neck operation.

item.title: Wyndham Clark admits ‘shock’ at seeing his father after sealing second US Open title
item.description: Wyndham Clark had no idea his dad had flown through the night to make a rare appearance to see him win.

item.title: ‘Gut wrenching’: Families left out of pocket as tiny home business goes bust
item.description: Kerrie and Brendan Carney say they’re among dozens of families left in the lurch.

item.title: Channel Seven stars shine bright as full list of TV Week Logie Awards nominees is released
item.description: Larry Emdur and Stephen Peacocke are among the stars nominated for this year’s awards, with hit shows Australian Idol and Farmer Wants A Wife also in the running.

item.title: Nicole Kidman and Keith Urban publicly acknowledge each other for first time since split
item.description: The country singer and Australian actress finalised their divorce in January after 19 years of marriage.

item.title: Concern as new anti-scam rules could lead to important texts being labelled spam
item.description: Businesses and services will be required to register branded text messages.

item.title: Sarah Di Lorenzo’s crunchy salmon salad packed with healthy fats
item.description: This crunchy salmon salad is packed with the healthy fats experts want you eating more of.

item.title: ‘A long road ahead’: Family of Coogee shark attack victim share health update
item.description: St Vincent’s Hospital shared a statement on behalf of the young mother’s family, after hundreds took part in a swim to support her.

item.title: Singer Jessie J issues warning after breast cancer surgery and treatment: ‘Changed me forever’
item.description: The British pop star shared a video filmed in hospital.

item.title: The healthy fish pie inspired by Arrnott Olssen’s 50kg weight loss
item.description: Fresh barramundi, coconut curry sauce and sweet potato star in this hearty recipe.

item.title: Kristy Bennett’s family issues extraordinary update after ‘severely disabled’ jockey wakes from 20-day coma
item.description: The 29-year-old has warmed hearts with an incredible act upon waking for the first time since her accident.

item.title: Manu Feildel shares the quick and easy French cassoulet recipe you’ll want all winter
item.description: The TV chef shared a hearty French classic perfect for cooler nights.

item.title: Keir Starmer resigns as UK PM and Labour Party leader
item.description: Britain is bracing for its seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Who is Andy Burnham, the lawmaker seeking to replace Keir Starmer
item.description: Andy Burnham’s nickname is inspired by Game of Thrones.

item.title: Marketa Vondrousova banned for four years after refusing drug test
item.description: The former world No.6 has not competed since pulling out of the Adelaide International in January.

item.title: Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson cleared of any wrongdoing after nightclub incident before New Zealand Test
item.description: Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson were both investigated by the independent Cricket Regulator.

item.title: MasterChef favourite Kishwar Chowdhury puts a Bengali twist on the humble sausage roll
item.description: The classic sausage roll is getting a Bengali makeover

item.title: Labor and Greens make deal on negative gearing and capital gains tax reforms
item.description: The government says the reforms will be fairer on workers and first home buyers.

item.title: Major commuter relief as NSW announces lower toll caps in state budget
item.description: The change is tipped to help an extra 200,000 people when introduced.

item.title: Aussie mum and influencer Danielle Mitchell shares heartbreaking update with fans after difficult pregnancy
item.description: ‘We are at peace with knowing she won’t be fighting and suffering anymore.’

item.title: Queensland budget winners and losers revealed as largest cost-of-living relief package announced ahead of Olympic spending
item.description: David Crisafulli’s government has handed down its second budget, bringing relief and no new taxes despite the cost of the 2032 Games.

item.title: More than 125,000 Aussies set to receive major compensation payout after bungled Robodebt scheme
item.description: Australia’s biggest class action settlement will be paid out to Robodebt victims.

item.title: Gold Coast girl suffers severe facial burns after copying dangerous squishy toy social media trend
item.description: ‘I could feel my skin coming off.’

item.title: Collingwood leading push to revolutionise AFL pre-game
item.description: The back-to-the-future move is the brainchild of the club’s fitness boss, who was previously in the NRL.

item.title: Concerns grow for Geelong forward Tyson Stengle after missing VFL flight
item.description: Eyewitnesses have alleged the forward was at a nightclub just days before his missed a flight with the team.

item.title: Hawthorn coach Sam Mitchell ‘gettable’ for the ‘right price’
item.description: If Hawthorn fans think the master coach is locked in for the next 10 years, they don’t fully understand how he ticks.

item.title: Wicketkeeper Beth Mooney suffers double injury blow in Aussie World Cup win over Pakistan
item.description: The star player has sent a serious scare through the tournament for the second match in a row.

item.title: ‘Say goodbye to aspiration’: Michaelia Cash slams Labor over Greens tax deal
item.description: The Coalition has declared war on the government’s ‘toxic taxes’.

item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns shuts door on shark summit as sighting closes Bondi Beach
item.description: A spate of attacks and sightings has beachgoers on edge.

item.title: Scientists confirm Pilbara asteroid crater to be world’s oldest
item.description: Clever detective work by scientists has uncovered the Earth's oldest known asteroid impact crater in the outback.

item.title: Qantas super jumbo affected as regulators order urgent Airbus A380 inspections over cracks
item.description: One Qantas plane and 15 operated by Emirates need to be checked.

item.title: Karl Stefanovic reportedly sacked by Channel Nine after controversial podcast episode with UK alt-right figure Tommy Robinson
item.description: Far-right wing influencer Tommy Robinson’s appearance on the show is believed to have sparked the decision.

item.title: Customers furious after being charged more than checkout price after Coles promotion on Uber Eats
item.description: Shoppers claim hundreds of dollars were withdrawn from their accounts days after placing discounted grocery orders.

item.title: Researchers find young Australians ageing faster internally, potentially increasing cancer risk
item.description: Younger adults are increasingly being diagnosed with cancers traditionally associated with older age.

item.title: Dr Spider-Man: Medical student becomes real-life superhero helping Queensland kids in hospital
item.description: He has raised more than $10,000 to help give toys to sick kids while dressed as his childhood hero.

item.title: Europe swelters under deadly 'Omega' heat dome
item.description: Much of western Europe is baking under a heat dome as temperatures soar toward 40C in some countries.

item.title: France reports first Ebola case in current outbreak after doctor returns from DR Congo
item.description: ‘The risk is low, whether it’s France or other countries in Europe, they shouldn’t overreact.’

item.title: ICC laws to forbid Indian cricket teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi from sharing rooms with teammates during UK tour
item.description: Measures have already been taken for the 15-year-old who will represent India in the T20 internationals.

item.title: Drones set to monitor Sydney’s most popular beaches for sharks
item.description: It comes amid concerns over an increase in shark activity at popular beaches.

item.title: Australian boxer Liam Paro an IBF champion again after history-making fight
item.description: ‘Love me, hate me, you can’t take that from me.’

item.title: Teal MPs launch new centrist political party aimed at ‘unity over division’
item.description: ‘Across the country, Australians want something better.’

item.title: Australia’s Tristan Schoolkate sinks British favourite Dan Evans on sweltering day of Wimbledon qualifying
item.description: A tech issue caused a huge delay ... and it only prolonged the pain for local fans.

item.title: Middle East war: International nuclear agency reveals plan to inspect Iran enrichment sites
item.description: Iranian officials have muddied claims made by the agency.

item.title: Major earthquakes strike US, Venezuela and Japan
item.description: Shocking footage circulating online shows the scale of the damage across all three countries.

item.title: Middle East war: Israel and Lebanon in talks to transfer land occupied during conflict
item.description: Israeli forces have seized a swathe of southern Lebanon in response to Hezbollah strikes.

item.title: Middle East war: Trump shifts blame for disastrous attack on Iranian school
item.description: The strike on the first day of the current conflict killed 175 children.

item.title: Mandy Melham, mother of star jockey Ben Melham, banned from horse racing
item.description: The awkward situation is under investigation and centres around documentation of a horse.

item.title: This Dubbo mum was frightened to have a second baby. Then a video call changed everything
item.description: ‘I knew they knew me. They knew my story. I didn’t have to keep repeating myself about what had happened because that was quite traumatic to relive it.’

item.title: German fitness influencer Edda Elisa claims Lufthansa refused to let her board in revealing outfit
item.description: ‘You’re naked.’

item.title: Channel 7 star Kate McCarthy ‘buoyed’ by AFL community’s ‘overwhelming’ response to online abuse
item.description: The prominent commentator choked back tears as she spoke ‘from the bottom of my heart’.

item.title: The new price gouging law starts on July 1. Can it rein in Coles and Woolworths?
item.description: The law comes into effect at a time when the major supermarkets are under scrutiny for their pricing practices.

item.title: The lifeline saving regional mums through a computer and their internet connection
item.description: ‘The reality is, 25 per cent of parents are experiencing symptoms and they just don’t know who to reach out to, where to go, what to do.’

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes: Death toll climbs to 235 as thousands remain missing
item.description: The quakes were among the strongest the country has seen in more than a century.

item.title: Emotional Today show hosts fight back tears after announcing Karl Stefanovic’s departure
item.description: ‘Karl has woken up with Today for 21 years so we know this is a huge change for our viewers and of course for us.’

item.title: Ship attacked in Strait of Hormuz after Iranian warning prompting UN to pause maritime escort operation
item.description: The International Maritime Organisation has temporarily suspended an operation to escort ships through the Strait of ‌Hormuz following an attack on a vessel.

item.title: Aussie F1 gun Oscar Piastri spills on bathroom sauna prep for Austrian Grand Prix: ‘Not for pleasure’
item.description: ‘You can cause yourself a lot of pain by doing that.’

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese defends sweeping tax changes amid trust concerns
item.description: After 45 days of heated debate and accusations of broken promises, the prime minister has defended his government's controversial housing tax reforms.

item.title: All the celebrity guests invited to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding
item.description: More than 1,000 people are expected to attend the event at Madison Square Garden in New York.

item.title: Fortescue harassment lawsuit spark demand for answers as Libby Mettam labels allegations ‘disappointing’
item.description: ‘Anyone who thinks this behaviour has a place at Fortescue is in the wrong company.’

item.title: South Australian man nearly bitten by bird flu-infected seabird at beach
item.description: A bodyboarder had a terrifying close call when a distressed seabird tried to bite him, with testing later confirming his fears about what the bird was carrying.

item.title: Teen sentenced over threats to kill PM Anthony Albanese and NSW Premier Chris Minns
item.description: The magistrate said threats against politicians are becoming far too common.

item.title: 7NEWS presenter Katrina Blowers running Gold Coast marathon to raise money for FightMND
item.description: ‘There are moments in life when you look at yourself and think — How did I end up here?’

item.title: Another suspected case of deadly H5 bird flu detected near Esperance
item.description: The latest case of H5 bird flu was reported by a member of the public who stumbled upon the bodies of migratory birds.

item.title: Grandmother jailed after arguing Ozempic led to her stabbing daughter-in-law and grandson
item.description: The 60-year-old claimed the viral weight-loss drug had contributed to her altered mental state during the horrific stabbing spree on her daughter-in-law and grandson.

item.title: Romanian Vasile Bombonel has jail sentence reduced despite spree of thefts across NSW
item.description: The 38-year-old and another man allegedly targeted women between 50 and 90 during a string of thefts, amounting to $26,500.

item.title: Serena Williams to face young Aussie Maya Joint in Wimbledon return
item.description: The all-time great has been handed a favourable draw for her grand slam comeback.

item.title: Fremantle MP Josh Wilson red-carded for punching an opposition player in the head during soccer game
item.description: The victim says he has asked for a personal apology but is yet to hear back.

item.title: Sydney becoming a ‘buyer’s market’ where houses under $1 million are reappearing
item.description: Houses buyers couldn’t have dreamt of affording a year ago are now within reach.

item.title: Three Maroons on report as Roosters heap more misery on Broncos
item.description: There will be a nervous wait for a number of stars after a bruising clash.

item.title: Medicare changes delayed after concerns vulnerable Australians could lose easier access to GPs
item.description: Health providers say the proposal risked creating unnecessary hurdles for patients.

item.title: Christmas market attacker Taleb al-Abdulmohsen jailed for life in Germany
item.description: The Saudi doctor drove a rented BMW into crowds at a historic market, killing six and injuring hundreds.

item.title: Doctor warns over rising demand for intimate cosmetic surgery
item.description: ‘It’s important for women to understand there’s a huge range of normal.’

item.title: In the red: Europe on high alert as ‘apocalyptic’ heat spreads
item.description: Scientists say the heatwave is the worst ever recorded on the continent.

item.title: US strikes Iran after drone attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz as Trump says Tehran violated ceasefire
item.description: The escalation has renewed fears over global shipping and oil and gas supplies.

item.title: Small aircraft slams into Beijing’s tallest tower sparking major investigation
item.description: Workers on the 108-storey skyscraper had to be evacuated after the crash.

item.title: AFL mum hijacks interview and embarrasses Hawthorn teenager Jack Dalton on live TV
item.description: Things became very awkward just as the young forward was discussing a very serious accident.

item.title: Tax office’s warning as millions of Australians prepare to lodge returns
item.description: Doing this one thing can cause mistakes and lead to big delays.

item.title: Parramatta Eels coach Jason Ryles hailed a hero after saving woman from burning car
item.description: The heroic rescue happened in the nick of time, with the entire car engulfed in flames just minutes later.

item.title: Mitsubishi wants a modern Lancer Evo, but has no plans for a performance revival
item.description: First Ralliart, now Evo. Mitsubishi has said it wants to go back to making 'wonderful' performance cars, but don't expect one to be built any time soon.

item.title: Dutch startup’s debut hypercar will be ridden, not driven
item.description: The key USP of Sanrivatti’s mid-engined hypercar will be its world-first ‘Apex Position’, which makes its driver more like a motorcycle rider.

item.title: Venezuelan earthquake kills more than 900 with thousands more missing or injured
item.description: More than 50,000 people have been reported missing after twin quakes struck.

item.title: Urgent warning as disease carried by cats linked to blindness and pregnancy issues
item.description: Experts estimate a half of the world’s population has come into contact with the parasite.

item.title: India questioned after T20 boilover and bizarre snub of teen sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
item.description: ‘Be ashamed of yourselves ... be very, very ashamed.’

item.title: Norway coach Stale Solbakken defends call as ‘reserves’ team gets thumped by France in World Cup farce
item.description: The decision has been defended but fans who spent ‘a ton of money’ are understandably filthy.

item.title: Teen boy charged after girl allegedly abducted outside Keysborough Secondary College in southeast Melbourne
item.description: The 17-year-old was allegedly forced into a car as she arrived at school.

item.title: Heartbreak for injured Socceroos duo Mathew Leckie and Jacob Italiano with World Cup over
item.description: ‘We’re all gutted for him.’

item.title: Brisbane coach Michael Maguire snaps at journo over team selection question
item.description: ‘People can say whatever they like.’

item.title: Cape Verde become smallest country to make World Cup knockout round, Uruguay sent packing
item.description: Cape Verde have made World Cup history, while a powerhouse nation is packing its bag.

item.title: Socceroos’ opponent for World Cup knockout round revealed as Egypt after Iran’s winner ruled offside
item.description: Last-minute controversy changed everything for Australia’s Round of 32 clash at the World Cup.

item.title: Two tropical storms put Japan on alert, evacuation orders issued for one million people amid landslide fears
item.description: More than 200 flights have been cancelled and train services suspended amid the wait for the approaching weather systems.

item.title: Australian man arrested at Bangkok airport after 17-year-old Thai girl’s body found in suitcase
item.description: The 17-year-old girl was last seen entering an apartment building with the man before she disappeared.

item.title: Patrick Cripps gives it to Harley Reid as Carlton steam train makes wildcard move with big win over West Coast
item.description: A record crowd came out to watch the Blues make history under their interim coach.

item.title: Cocaine worth $36 million seized from frozen berry shipment from Chile
item.description: Australian Border Force officers found a number of suspicious packages hidden inside a shipping container.

item.title: Devastated Dolphins star Isaiya Katoa rises to celebrate NRL contenders’ win in a classic over Warriors
item.description: The injured halfback put his own disappointment to one side when his teammates flipped the script in the dying minutes.

item.title: The Issue Podcast: ‘Never enough’: Greens Senator David Shoebridge slams Australia’s defence spending as wasteful blowout
item.description: ‘It’s like pouring water into a sieve.’

item.title: Three NSW Police staff charged in separate alleged criminal incidents
item.description: One officer has been suspended without pay, while the employment status of two other staff is under review.

item.title: Worrying detail spells trouble for Egypt superstar Mohamed Salah’s hopes for Socceroos knockout clash
item.description: The first statement has been issued on one of the biggest stories surrounding Australia’s World Cup knockout clash.

item.title: Paris hasn’t sat in a regular classroom in years. Her mum says she’s never been better
item.description: ‘She’s probably got a better social life than me ... it’s amazing.’

item.title: Nick Daicos lauds ‘step in the right direction’ after Magpies’ rare ton in win over Richmond
item.description: The stand-in skipper kicked three goals as Collingwood ended a two-month wait.

item.title: AFL icon Tony Modra breaks silence after horror crash with voice recording ahead of Showdown
item.description: The AFL icon’s voice has been heard for the first time since his life was saved, sharing a heartfelt message to fans.

item.title: What if Sydney’s newest suburbs looked different? Architects rethink the brick home
item.description: ‘We need to look at these houses differently in order to make them still functional, attractive, communities where we want to be.’

item.title: Jason Taumalolo-inspired Cowboys’ comeback stuns ladder leaders Penrith
item.description: Tongan royalty was in the stands and on the field as North Queensland claimed a monstrous upset.

item.description: ‘You’ve been stabbed? Whereabouts? I don’t think you have, mate.’

item.title: Sea Eagles star Luke Brooks suffers suspected season-ending ACL injury in win over Melbourne
item.description: The in-form five-eighth courageously battled on before accepting his ‘devastating’ fate.

item.title: Brumby cull: Inside the fierce battle to protect or kill Australia’s feral horses
item.description: Helicopter culls, political pressure and clashing worldviews will collide again as one of the nation’s fiercest environmental fights is put back on the table.

item.title: Boos rain down as mid-season goal review rule change immediately backfires on the AFL
item.description: A former coach has accused the AFL of being ‘allowed to do whatever they like’ - and it’s come back to haunt them.

item.title: 2026 Toyota GR Corolla GTS review
item.description: For a lifelong fan of the humble Toyota Corolla, is the performance version from Gazoo Racing the ultimate version? Ben Zachariah finds out.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Riverside Christian College’s 2024 dux never went to class. This is how they did it
item.description: Principal Michelle Gouge is the ultimate advocate for her school’s system, saying it bears little resemblance to what many Australians still imagine.

item.title: Zak Butters scoffs at reports he has told teammates he’s leaving Port Adelaide
item.description: ‘I’d love to know where he gets his stuff from. But yeah, that hasn’t happened.’

item.title: Hyundai i30: European boss hints at hatchback's demise
item.description: The third-gen Hyundai i30 has hung on grimly for a decade, fighting a rising tide of SUVs, and it may not get a direct replacement.

item.title: 2026 Honda HR-V price and specs
item.description: The Honda HR-V has received a sporty-looking e:HEV RS flagship for 2026, which joins an otherwise unchanged range.

item.title: George Russell takes pole at Austrian GP despite yellow flag controversy as Oscar Piastri banks seventh
item.description: George Russell appeared to ignore stewards’ rulings before an investigation uncovered the truth.

item.title: Top five large five-seat PHEV family SUVs in 2026
item.description: Who knew there was so much choice for families looking for a plug-in hybrid (PHEV) large five-seat SUV!

item.title: Six charged after dramatic arrest ends five-day crime spree across Melbourne's west
item.description: One of the victims said her young daughter is so traumatised she keeps a box at the front door of their Melbourne home to stop intruders.
